evidence_summary: The action climax of the chapter; demonstrates Carter's superhuman abilities and heroism.
During a solo flight, Carter encounters a Zodangan scout (a cousin of the Jeddak) being hunted by three Green Martian warriors. Carter intervenes in mid-air, kills the warriors, and saves the scout.
Close-ups of the combat and the kill.
